metadata.description: obsidian-wiki super setup: LLM Wiki synthesis for Obsidian (Karpathy + rohitg00 + agrici + ar9av).

plugins.name: obsidian-wiki-super-setup
plugins.description: An LLM-maintained, persistent, compounding knowledge base for Obsidian. Synthesizes the best of four LLM-Wiki implementations into one super-setup. 14 wiki skills + inherited utilities. Required frontmatter (summary/provenance/confidence). Tag elicitation at ingest time. Self-healing 14-check lint with AI-writing detection. Pre-publish audit. Graph export with interactive HTML viewer.
